step_self_employed.title: Your legal business structure
step_self_employed.subtitle: Choose which structure you want to use to work with gingr.
step_self_employed.business_type_freelan: You work on your own account and under your own name or as a sole proprietorship — without a separate company.
step_self_employed.business_type_company: You work through a company operated by you and registered in the commercial register (GmbH or AG).
step_self_employed.error_activity_urls_r: Please provide at least one profile URL.
step_self_employed.error_commercial_regi: Please upload the commercial register extract.
step_self_employed.error_invoice_proof_r: Please choose a document type and upload the document.
step_self_employed.error_confirmation_re: Please confirm the declaration to continue.
step_self_employed.error_fill_required_f: Please fill in all marked fields.
step_self_employed.error_save_freelancer: Saving your freelancer information failed. Please try again.
step_self_employed.error_save_company_fa: Saving your company information failed. Please try again.
step_self_employed.freelancer_ahv_hint: Official confirmation from the AHV compensation office
step_self_employed.freelancer_activity_u: Provide the URL(s) of your profile on a platform (e.g. an escort platform, your own website, etc.).
step_self_employed.freelancer_declaratio: I hereby confirm that I work on my own account and at my own risk, decide myself whether to accept bookings, organize my work independently, and am responsible for my taxes and social insurance myself.
step_self_employed.company_register_hint: Current extract from the commercial register (not older than 12 months)
step_self_employed.company_proof_label: Proof of authority to represent / billing *
step_self_employed.company_proof_descrip: Please upload one of the following documents:
step_self_employed.company_option_bank_d: Bank statement or bank confirmation in the company name
step_self_employed.company_option_invoic: Sample or actual invoice of the company
step_self_employed.company_declaration_t: I hereby confirm that the company is the contractual partner of gingr, that I am authorized to act on behalf of the company, and that the company is responsible for all tax, insurance, and social insurance obligations.
